Claude high-risk deleteQuestion: TRUE app-side duplicate of already-localized q0474 (point-accumulation cycle). Matcher q0914 was a wrong-concept fallback that failed numeric-overlap guardrail. Source asks: time for a new point-accumulation cycle, options 3/6/12/24 months. q0474 already in production es.
It should be 474 but it sounds a bit different it says "new" cycle. So I am willing to make it into a new question and the correct local answer key would be C 12 months.
